name: {{PREFIX}} Asset Lookups Refresh
description: Daily refresh of the SDL datatables for the asset-enrichment solution. Re-runs the savelookup queries against the assets datasource so {{IDENTITY_TABLE}} and {{ENDPOINT_TABLE}} stay current. Bind a SentinelOne connection before activating. Import with ?siteIds={{SITE_ID}}.
